1.findings: 8 CVEs identified (2 CRITICAL, 2 HIGH, 3 MEDIUM, 1 LOW). All patches available. Architecture inventory created with 13 backend services and 5 frontend components mapped. Highest-risk flows identified for Phase 2 analysis.

2.findings: 9 bypass analyses completed across all CVEs. Key findings: CVE-2025-3454 patched with parser differential residual risk; CVE-2025-11539 is renderer-side (not in main repo) with default auth token '-'; CVE-2026-21725 TOCTOU confirmed with missing FOR UPDATE lock.

3.findings: Knowledge base report constructed with 5 DFD slices, 5 CFD slices, 14 attack scenarios, 12 CodeQL extraction targets. Domain attack research covers Go HTTP proxy, React plugin XSS, RBAC scope binding, cache invalidation races, and multi-tenant isolation. 19 unauthenticated endpoints cataloged. 9 security-impacting default configurations documented.

4.findings: 23 SAST findings: 2 CRITICAL (CVE-2026-21722 annotation timerange bypass confirmed at source+sink), 11 HIGH (SQL injection x3, path differential, header injection, ServeFile no confinement, zip symlink traversal, SSRF, JWT unverified, CSRF bypass, path injection), 7 MEDIUM (TOCTOU, cache no invalidation, TLS InsecureSkipVerify, XSS in MarkdownCell, reflected XSS, ServeFile defense-in-depth, bad redirect), 3 LOW (timing attack, GHA pull_request_target, template.URL). CodeQL DB: 1,035,634 LoC. 3 new DFD slices discovered (Cloud Migration SSRF, Plugin Zip Symlink, JWT Unverified Claims).

5.findings: 29 candidate findings triaged (23 SAST + 6 Phase 6 spec gaps). 18 retained for Phase 7, 11 dropped. Key decisions: SAST-011 (JWT unverified claims) confirmed false positive — UnsafeClaimsWithoutVerification is in Test() probe function not auth path. SAST-017 (MarkdownCell disableSanitizeHtml) downgraded — confirmed to be admin server config not datasource-data-controlled. SAST-016 (InsecureSkipVerify) dropped — admin-opt-in AllowInsecure flag. SAST-018 (reflected XSS) dropped — insufficient source context for generic response_writer sink. SAST-019 dropped as duplicate of retained SAST-008. SAST-020 dropped — no confirmed open redirect bypass. All 3 LOWs dropped per policy. SPEC-GAP-005 (WebSocket) dropped — reqSignedIn gate + high exploit prerequisites. SPEC-GAP-006 (CSP unsafe-eval) dropped — defense-in-depth gap, not independently exploitable. 2 new CRITICAL (SAST-001/002), 10 HIGH, 3 MEDIUM retained from SAST. 4 spec gap findings retained (SPEC-GAP-001/002 HIGH, SPEC-GAP-003/004 MEDIUM).

6.findings: 6 spec gaps identified across 5 specs: 3 HIGH (OIDC ID token claim validation bypass, generic OAuth signature bypass default, OIDC claims not validated post-signature), 3 MEDIUM (JWT exp optionality, hop-by-hop header forwarding, WebSocket empty Origin bypass, CSP unsafe-eval with nonce). All gaps include specific file:line references and credible exploit paths.

7.findings: 3 Review Chambers completed. Chamber 1 (Auth/AuthZ): 4 valid findings (p7-001 through p7-004), 2 FPs, 4 attack patterns (AP-001 through AP-004). Chamber 2 (Proxy/SSRF): 3 valid findings (p7-020 through p7-022), 4 attack patterns (AP-020 through AP-022). Chamber 3 (Data Isolation/Rendering): 6 valid findings (p7-040 through p7-045), 5 attack patterns (AP-040 through AP-044). 13 total findings drafted. Phase 7 Addendum: 3 new attack surfaces discovered (Cloud Migration SSRF, Plugin Zip Symlink, JWT Unverified Claims).

8.findings: P8-LITE FP elimination complete. Stage 1 (inline fp-check): all 13 p7 findings reviewed, no additional FPs identified beyond Phase 7 chamber debates. Stage 2 (cold verifier): p7-040 (PUBLIC DASHBOARD ANNOTATION TIMERANGE BYPASS) confirmed HIGH — cold verifier downgraded from CRITICAL to HIGH due to 3 non-default preconditions required. p7-041 (RENDERER JWT FORGERY) confirmed HIGH with executed PoC (PASS). 2 additional drafts promoted: p7-064 (DEFAULT SECRETS ENCRYPTION KEY HIGH) and p7-065 (SESSION TOKEN MEDIUM).

9.findings: Variant analysis complete across 7 root findings. 15 total variants discovered: p7-040 → p7-060 (authenticated annotation bypass MEDIUM); p7-001 → p9-066 (AzureAD MEDIUM), p9-067 (JWT nbf MEDIUM); p7-021 → p9-072 (MEDIUM), p9-073 (HIGH presigned URL exfiltration EXECUTED), p9-074 (MEDIUM Cloud Monitoring); p7-041 → p7-063 (MEDIUM), p7-064 (HIGH default encryption key), p7-065 (MEDIUM); p7-003 → p7-075 (MEDIUM), p7-076 (MEDIUM), p7-077 (MEDIUM); p7-042/043/044 → p9-078 (MEDIUM), p9-079 (MEDIUM), p9-080 (MEDIUM); p7-020 → 0 variants.

10.findings: 28 confirmed findings promoted to security/findings/ (4 HIGH, 24 MEDIUM). PoC execution results: H2 executed (JWT forgery test PASS, OrgRole=Admin), H3 executed (encrypt/decrypt cycle proven with known default key SW2YcwTIb9zpOOhoPsMm), H4 executed (full 4-stage SSRF chain in live Grafana 12.3.2 Docker with snapshot_part_*.bin exfiltrated). H1 and all 24 MEDIUM findings: theoretical (strong code-level evidence). Final report written to security/final-audit-report.md.

1.findings: 42 CVEs identified (2024-2026). Architecture inventory with 19 key components. 4 bypasses confirmed.

2.findings: 25 bypass analyses. 4 confirmed bypasses: CVE-2024-9264 (SQL INTO OUTFILE), CVE-2026-21720 (avatar anon bypass), CVE-2024-1313 (K8s snapshot), CVE-2024-9476 (CancelSnapshot orgID).

3.findings: 15 DFD/CFD slices, 17 attack scenarios, 30 CodeQL targets. 1,036,067 LoC audited.

4.findings: 23 SAST findings. CodeQL + Semgrep Pro + 10 custom rules. 5 high-priority targets confirmed.

5.findings: 4 probe teams, 60 validated hypotheses. Key: SQL INTO OUTFILE 4-control failure, renderer JWT default token, snapshot RBAC never invoked, auth proxy empty whitelist.

6.findings: 7 spec gaps. SPEC-GAP-005: SQL INTO OUTFILE via IsReadOnly bypass confirmed independently.

7.findings: 15 enriched findings retained from 30 candidates. 15 dropped (duplicates, FPs, insufficient evidence).

8.findings: 3 chambers: 10 new p8-xxx findings (5 HIGH, 5 MEDIUM). 1 duplicate dropped. Key: p8-001 snapshot RBAC, p8-004 auth proxy bypass, p8-040 SQL RCE, p8-041 renderer JWT.

9.findings: Stage 1: p8-042 dropped as duplicate. Stage 2: 5 cold verifiers — 4 CONFIRMED HIGH (H1-H6), 1 downgraded HIGH→MEDIUM (H7/M21 renderer JWT: impact limited to read-only endpoints, not full admin).

10.findings: 7 variant hunters found 17 new variants. p8-010 (H3), p8-030 (H5) elevated to HIGH. 20 MEDIUM variants total.

11.findings: 27 confirmed findings (6 HIGH, 21 MEDIUM). Post-audit verification: all 21 previously theoretical findings verified — 18 executed via Go unit tests, 3 code-confirmed via static analysis. 0 theoretical remaining. Final report: security/final-audit-report.md.
